title: Light Armor
description: Light Armor for Maximum Skin Visibility
body:
This resource pack gives Minecraft’s armor a sleek, minimalist redesign, based on Dresdom’s Light Armor. I've modified it to show off even more of your character's skin—perfect for players who want style without losing protection.

It pairs great with the Female Gender Mod, making your custom skin and character design stand out. Armor physics are automatically updated for smooth integration.

Features

  • Streamlined armor textures inspired by Dresdom’s original design.
  • Covers all major armor types: Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite.
  • Blends with the vanilla look while keeping your character visible.
